languages.text: "Я могу превратить твое наказание в нечто похуже смерти... об этом ты не задумывалась?"
"I could turn your punishment into something worse than death... Did you ever consider that?"
languages.original_text: "Я могу превратить твое наказание в нечто похуже смерти... об этом ты не задумывалась?"

traits.locale_text: "I could turn your punishment into something worse than death... Did you ever consider that?"
"I could turn your punishment into something worse than death... Did you ever consider that?"
"I could turn your punishment into something worse than death... Did you ever consider that?"

languages.text: 「君の罰は死よりも酷いものに変えられる... 考えたことはあるか？」
languages.original_text: "I could turn your punishment into something worse than death... Did you ever consider that?"

traits.locale_text: 「君の罰は死よりも酷いものに変えられる... 考えたことはあるか？」

languages.text: "Cezanı, ölümden daha kötü bir şeye çevirebilirim... Bunu hiç düşündün mü?"
languages.original_text: "I could turn your punishment into something worse than death... Did you ever consider that?"

traits.locale_text: "Cezanı, ölümden daha kötü bir şeye çevirebilirim... Bunu hiç düşündün mü?"

languages.text: «Podría hacer que su castigo fuera peor que la muerte... ¿Ha pensado en eso?».
languages.original_text: "I could turn your punishment into something worse than death... Did you ever consider that?"

traits.locale_text: «Podría hacer que su castigo fuera peor que la muerte... ¿Ha pensado en eso?».

languages.text: “你想过没有，我能让你遭受比死更可怕的惩罚……”
languages.original_text: "I could turn your punishment into something worse than death... Did you ever consider that?"

traits.locale_text: “你想过没有，我能让你遭受比死更可怕的惩罚……”

languages.text: « Je pourrais vous infliger une punition bien pire que la mort... Y avez-vous songé ? »
languages.original_text: "I could turn your punishment into something worse than death... Did you ever consider that?"

traits.locale_text: « Je pourrais vous infliger une punition bien pire que la mort... Y avez-vous songé ? »

languages.text: "Ich könnte Eure Strafe in etwas verwandeln, das schlimmer ist als der Tod ... Habt Ihr daran jemals gedacht?"
languages.original_text: "I could turn your punishment into something worse than death... Did you ever consider that?"

traits.locale_text: "Ich könnte Eure Strafe in etwas verwandeln, das schlimmer ist als der Tod ... Habt Ihr daran jemals gedacht?"
